features.name: Favored Enemy
features.description: You gain expertise in the Wisdom (Perception) skill and can choose one type of enemy to be your favored enemy. You have advantage on Investigation checks you make to track that kind of creature.

features.name: Spellcasting Ability
features.description: Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for ranger spells. You use Wisdom whenever a spell refers to your spellcasting ability. In addition, you use your Wisdom modifier when making saving throws when a spell cast by a ranger targets you and when making attack rolls with spells you cast.

features.name: Favored Enemy
features.description: Choose a type of enemy (beasts, plants, humanoid, and so on). The DC of Wisdom (Perception) checks you make to sense the chosen enemy increases by 2. You have advantage on attack rolls against the chosen enemy. Additionally, whenever you reduce an enemy of that type to 0 hit points, you gain temporary hit points equal to twice your level.

features.name: Natural Explorer
features.description: You can move through the space of any creature or object that doesn't block movement and that is up to three sizes larger than you as if it were difficult terrain. Additionally, you can use the Dash action as a bonus action on each of your turns.

features.name: Primeval Heritage
features.description: Choose from the ranger's two primeval heritage options: Beast Master or Druidic. Each grants unique abilities related to your connection with nature.

features.name: Fleet of Foot
features.description: Your base walking speed increases by 10 feet, and you can use the Dash action as a bonus action on each of your turns.

features.name: Sworn Enemy
features.description: Choose an additional type of enemy. The DC of Wisdom (Perception) checks to sense this new enemy also increases by 2, and you gain advantage on attack rolls against it. Additionally, whenever you reduce a sworn enemy to 0 hit points, you gain temporary hit points equal to twice your level.

features.name: Track
features.description: You can follow tracks left behind in any substance, including the ground, snow, water, and even air (as with flying creatures).

features.name: Epic Spellcasting (Spell Slots) +3
features.description: You can now cast spells of 7th and higher level using spell slots.

features.name: Epic Spellcasting (Bonus Spells) +2 per day
features.description: You gain two bonus spell slots of 8th level to use each day.

features.name: Cantrip
features.description: You know a cantrip of your choice from the wizard spell list.

features.name: Skill Versatility
features.description: You gain proficiency in two skills of your choice.

features.name: Versatile Performance
features.description: When you use your Performance or Persuasion skill, you can roll a d4 and add the number rolled to any ability check made with that skill.

features.name: Hide in Plain Sight
features.description: Starting at 3rd level, you can use the Dash, Disengage, and Hide actions even while being observed.

features.name: Vanish
features.description: You can cast the vanish spell without expending a spell slot.

features.name: Wild Step
features.description: You can move through the space of any creature, regardless of difficult terrain. You can use this feature a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, and you regain all uses of it when you finish a long rest.

features.name: Feral Instinct
features.description: When you are reduced to 0 hit points but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 hit point instead. You can use this feature only after dropping to 0 hit points and before taking damage on your next turn.

features.name: Endurance
features.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being frightened, charmed, or knocked prone. Additionally, you gain an extra action during your short rest.

At level 18, you gain preternatural senses. When you attack a creature you can't see, inability to see doesn't impose disadvantage on your attack rolls. You also have advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing.

features.name: Assassin's Blade
features.description: You gain the Assassin's Blade feature.

features.name: Deadly Precision
features.description: You gain the Deadly Precision feature.

features.name: Rapid Strike
features.description: You gain the Rapid Strike feature.

features.name: Shadow Step
features.description: You gain the Shadow Step feature.

features.name: Assassin's Luck
features.description: You gain the Assassin's Luck feature.

features.name: Fatal Flourish
features.description: You gain the Fatal Flourish feature.
